name: bunsql-tagged-template-pattern
description: Bun.sql uses tagged template syntax: sql`SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ${id}`. To call programmatically from [sql, params] tuple, use pattern: sql.split(/\$\d+/) to get string parts, then call sql(parts, ...params). This converts parameterized query format to tagged template invocation. Key insight: Bun.sql expects template string array and interpolation values, not a string with $1 placeholders.
recommendation: Implement programmatic tagged template invocation in BunSqlExecutor.execute(). Handle edge cases: empty params array, trailing placeholders, consecutive placeholders.
